observation: PACT-001 did not flag AccountSid in URL path. Candidate rule PACT-006 CredentialInPath.
Score saturated at 100 with 62 HIGH findings — the cap hides the real magnitude.
Manifest generator does not read securitySchemes to populate required_headers. TD-002.

PACT-001 fired on GitHub Packages restore endpoints with "required": false. The ?token= param is a legacy fallback — primary auth is via Authorization header. Current rule does not distinguish mandatory query-string auth (CRITICAL) from optional legacy query-string auth (should be HIGH). Severity may be inflated for these 3 findings. Candidate: TD-011.

PACT-002 fired on /installation/token DELETE and /user/interaction-limits DELETE. These are token revocations and rate-limit resets scoped to the authenticated caller — not deletions of identified resources. The rule fires correctly (DELETE with no path ID), but human_explanation does not capture the revocation semantic. Partial false positive at explanation level, not detection level. Candidate: TD-010.
